name: bandit.local_standoff_return_timeout_mcw
description: Live product-path probe for the reopened bandit standoff/return correction: start from the current nearby-owned-site McWilliams/Basecamp footing, prove the five-OMT hold-off dispatch through wait_action, then keep advancing bounded 30m waits until the scout sortie times out, routes home, and writes back instead of lingering forever at standoff.
artifact_patterns: bandit_live_world scout_sortie: linger limit reached -> return_home

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams fixture; startup/load evidence only before standoff/return proof

steps.label: disable_safe_mode
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode off and gameplay still focused before time advancement

steps.label: wait_30m_to_basecamp_standoff_gate
steps.abort_reason: long wait was interrupted or produced a prompt before scout return-home evidence could be captured
steps.expected_visible_fact: first 30m reaches hold-off standoff with live_dispatch_goal=140,46,0
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu

steps.label: wait_30m_return_window_1
steps.abort_reason: long wait was interrupted or produced a prompt before scout return-home evidence could be captured
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded 30m wait completes or records an interruption while scout return-home artifacts are watched
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu

evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for standoff/return behavior
live_required_checkpoints: post load: normal McWilliams gameplay screen after fixture install
safe mode off: gameplay still focused after safe-mode toggle
wait menu: each long wait shows a real wait-action menu before selecting 30m
standoff: debug log contains hold_off and live_dispatch_goal=140,46,0
return: debug log contains return_home, home-footprint observation, and returned pressure-refresh writeback without a stale returning-home loop
evidence_contract.failure_rule: If the run only loads, lacks wait-action screenshots, lacks the standoff artifact, or never emits scout return/writeback artifacts, it is not return proof.
